name: conjugador-espanol
description: conjugador de verbos españoles usando reglas lingüisticas

scripts.build: npm run build:node && npm run build:web
scripts.update-web-page: npm run build && npm run update-verbos-with-test-results && npm run cp-web-page
scripts.test-full: npm run validate && npm run test
scripts.prep-release: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run validate && npm run test && npm run update-verbos-with-test-results && npm run cp-web-page && npm run server

author: Peter Snider
